title: BLUELIGHT RAT: YARA PDB Path Indicators (APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight)
description: Detects BLUELIGHT malware PDB path strings in process memory, file content, or Sysmon ImageLoaded events. Based on Volexity YARA rule APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight (id: 3ec2d44c). The PDB paths 'Development\BACKDOOR\ncov\' and 'Release\bluelight.pdb' are unique to BLUELIGHT compilation artifacts.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*\\Development\\BACKDOOR\\ncov\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*Release\\bluelight.pdb*') and 'Original File Name' like '*bluelight*') or (('Target Filename' like '*bluelight.pdb*' or 'Target Filename' like '*BACKDOOR\\ncov*'))) | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'Process Name'
falsepositives: None expected - PDB paths are unique compilation artifacts
